head: 8ff6dee
headNote: Findings were originally assessed at 4ec33b4 (pre-remediation). This index is updated through 8ff6dee (PR #29 850afde, #30 3eb9e82, #31 8ff6dee), released as v1.0.0-preview.10.

realityGate.verdict: Reality Gate 3/3 PASS — build+tests green; walking skeleton runs end-to-end on real Claude; live /plan-breakdown round-trip verified.
realityGate.planBreakdownEvidence: Independent regeneration of examples/hello-guardrails/hello-guardrails.md following the plan-breakdown skill -> guardrails validate exit 0; guardrails plan -> 3 waves (1->2->3). Manual/dogfood demo, not a CI-runnable test.

findings.notes: FIXED in PR #29 (850afde). Worker now records the first non-OCE fault, cancels a run-scoped linked CTS + completes the channel so siblings drain, and RunAsync rethrows after WhenAll -> always terminates with harness-error exit. Regression test UnexpectedExecutorThrow_TerminatesTheRun_AndSurfacesTheFault (proven to hang on pre-fix code).

DETERMINISTIC CI HALF added in PR #29 (GoldenRoundTripTests: load hello-guardrails via PlanLoader, assert PlanValidator clean, lossless structural round-trip + loader determinism). The LIVE /plan-breakdown regeneration (Reality Gate #3) was verified 2026-06-15 (independent regen of hello-guardrails.md -> validate exit 0, plan 3 waves) -> gate now PASS, though it remains a manual/dogfood demo, not a CI-runnable test.

RESOLVED in PR #29 via root .gitattributes (eol=lf on the drift pair, examples/hello-guardrails/**, test fixtures) + observable-contract CRLF tests. NUANCE: a unit tripwire on the internal Replace(\r\n,\n) is unachievable - the renderer is independently \r-robust (JSON parse + Trim), so the Replace is redundant defense; .gitattributes is the real net for the CRLF-hash bug class.
FIXED in PR #29. promptRunners schema block made byte-identical SSOT<->skill, wrapped in canonical-schema:promptRunners sentinels; SchemaDriftTests asserts equality with an actionable diff on drift.
FIXED in PR #29. SSOT 02-schemas-and-contracts.md §12 documents the logs command + run --log-server flags (loopback-only bind, routes, defaults). Also added logs to the §7 fixup command list.

FIXED in PR #29. New CurrentSuccessfulAttempt selects the latest succeeded attempt whose fragment.json audit copy is on disk (current-state provenance), falling back to transcript-only. Regression test DependencyContext_AfterResetRerun_PointsAtCurrentStateAttempt_NotStaleLaterAttempt. LATENT: journal models provenance only implicitly (entry MergeSequence + on-disk fragment.json); a self-describing per-attempt mergeSequence would be a future SSOT change (architect-owned).

FIXED in PR #30 (3eb9e82, commit 04f6ca0). Added an end-to-end test that exercises LogsCommand's real journal->status-word mapping (StatusText switch) instead of injecting a bypassing lambda - changing a status word now fails a test.

FIXED in PR #30 (3eb9e82, commit 001afa8). README exit-2 description corrected to the SSOT §7 general actionable-signal meaning (needs-human, graph --check stale, lock --check drift, merge conflicts); README command table now lists the registered lock and merge commands.

RESOLVED in PR #31 (8ff6dee). The per-run cost cap (maxCostUsd) now exists: the scheduler halts new launches once cumulative journaled cost reaches the cap (needs-human 'cost cap reached', dependents blocked); GR2012 validates non-positive caps. Risk row 1 wording corrected (SSOT §2 + skill document the cap). Implemented by the harness dogfooding itself (docs/plans/04-dogfood-cost-cap). The original P3 was a wording/expectation fix; the v2 cap was then built as the first v2 slice.
FIXED in PR #30 (3eb9e82, commit 21e48bb). ClaudeTranscriptRenderer.Truncate no longer slices mid-surrogate-pair (would emit U+FFFD); truncation respects UTF-16 surrogate boundaries.

FIXED in PR #30 (3eb9e82, commit 21e48bb). Renderer docstring corrected: output is deterministic for a given input stream (it no longer claims it 'never varies run-to-run' when the input itself varies per run).
FIXED in PR #30 (3eb9e82, commit 37f4fcf). Log server no longer ReadToEnds the whole file on every ~1s poll; a stale-proof cache avoids redundant full re-reads.
FIXED in PR #30 (3eb9e82, commit 37f4fcf). Race-resilient bind replaces the FreeLoopbackPort probe-then-rebind TOCTOU that could flake under parallel test execution.

Already content-hash-based on disk (in-history 3307283); the 2026-06-10 carry-forward was STALE vs current master. PR #29 verified + hardened: fail loudly when git hash-object errors instead of silently comparing empty strings. git diff HEAD appears nowhere in the dogfood folder.

COMPLETED via PR #31 (8ff6dee). guardrails run docs/plans/04-dogfood-cost-cap drove the per-run cost cap to green end-to-end: 01 authored failing tests (tests-fail-on-current-code proven), 02 implemented to green (Release build + ~CostCap filter 10/10 + tests-untouched guardrails), 03 documented maxCostUsd (honest needs-human halt on a .claude/ write boundary; a human applied the one skill edit and resumed, after which the guardrail verified it), 04 whole-suite Release build+test gate. Final: 4/4 tasks green, total ~$12.66. M7 dogfood exit criterion MET. Shipped in v1.0.0-preview.10.

NuGet OIDC publish pipeline working; v1.0.0-preview.1 through preview.10 shipped (ServantSoftware.Guardrails). preview.10 (8ff6dee) bundles the P3 batch (#30) + the dogfooded cost-cap feature (#31); release run 27589652767 all green incl. pack+publish.

DONE 2026-06-15 against post-remediation master 850afde: guardrails run examples/hello-guardrails/hello-guardrails --fresh --no-ui -> 3/3 green, exit 0, total $0.8759 (Reality Gate #2 -> PASS). Reality Gate #3 (live plan-breakdown round-trip) also verified 2026-06-15 -> full gate now 3/3.
FIXED in PR #29. SSOT §8 now documents composed-prompt.<name>.md, guardrail-<name>.stream.jsonl, .transcript.md, .verdict.json + sanitization; §2 interpreter example corrected (added {args}).
DONE in PR #30 (3eb9e82, commit 988b58a). TaskExecutor split: action dispatch / prompt execution / guardrail execution extracted into focused collaborators; the god-class debt is retired.

SUBSTANTIALLY ADDRESSED by PR #29: the dependency-context regression test uses a multi-task FakeClaudePlanBuilder fixture where the dependent reads the dependency's fragment via GUARDRAILS_STATE_IN (new nofragment mode + SetMode). Covers the prompt-pipeline state-passing gap.
